Zoey Solomon
Home

Artist & Documentarian

Multidisciplinary artist working at the intersection of research, video art, music, and technology. Her work blends intensive inquiry, intimate interviews, self-composed violin scores, and unconventional videography to create projects that are both emotionally resonant and intellectually rigorous.

Her work explores the friction between digital and physical worlds of performance — how audiovisual and technical components intersect and clash, and how the internet shapes artistic practice when online aesthetics can be both low and high brow.

01 B.A. Urban & Environmental Policy, Minor in Media Arts — Occidental College
02 Archival Researcher — Ken Burns
03 Screened in New York, Los Angeles, Milan, Melbourne & London
04 Art Educator
